user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Adatum Corporation.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-22 09:44 EST
Subject: consumption trend - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with consumption trend. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
Date: 2024-02-12 17:44 EST
Subject: URGENT: consumption trend Issue at Adatum Corporation

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with consumption trend. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-22 16:18 EST
Subject: Re: Re: consumption trend Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for consumption trend. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

Meeting: consumption trend Discussion - Adatum Corporation
Date: 2024-02-11
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation), Raj Mehta (Microsoft), David (Adatum Corporation)

[00:01:15] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is consumption trend.

[00:07:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for resource allocation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:10:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for security compliance is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:13:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

[00:15:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): The timeline for budget approval is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:19:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Let me add some context -- we've been working on resource allocation and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:24:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for integration complexity is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:26:00] David (Adatum Corporation): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.

[00:29:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is security compliance.

[00:34:00] David (Adatum Corporation): The timeline for vendor dependencies is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:36:00] David (Adatum Corporation): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is partner engagement.
